But tbh the boss fight in Chapter 3 still felt a bit abrupt like they just went “uuuhhh we need a boss fight, seafarers go invade them”
Chapter 4: i think the bit where we made cake with william and murphy was cute but it felt… sudden?

you heard it
its sanga
I guess it’s supposed to be coral? Since sanga/珊 is taken from the chinese character for coral. But why would it say my coral
wait Sanga means coral?
in CN?
Yeah
珊 is pronounced Shān, a homophone for Sanga, and it also means Coral
Corposant/克珀珊特 also has that same character in it so thats probably why her name got mixed up with Sanga’s for a while
克珀珊特=kè pò shān tè or Conquer, Amber, Coral, Special if one was to translate each of the character individually
They commonly pick homophone characters with related meanings
Ah damn. Now i realized
Nobody in EN fandom knows Sangas name means coral
This knowledge is limited to Chinese speakers
its the mob that adds the coral barb debuff card to your hand
I think most of the characters names were decided in English first because it’s a game set in London/with lovecraftian themes
the one that does damage for every card u play unless you play the coral
But they probably came up with Sanga’s Chinese name first
Then picked a random word with a similar sound in English
So it’s probably mistranslation
most likely
A pity because it’s not gonna convey that Coral meaning in EN but things are always bound to get lost in translation
